name: gallery-thumbnail-click
trigger: click a thumbnail in the strip below the main image
delta: Main hero image swaps to the clicked thumbnail's src immediately (no crossfade); the clicked thumbnail gets a highlighted (active) border. Reproduced in products/<slug>/index.html inline script: click handler on .thumb-btn sets #gallery-main-img.src and toggles .active class.

name: gallery-arrow-scroll
trigger: click left/right arrow beside the thumbnail strip
delta: Scrolls the thumbnail track horizontally (smooth). Reproduced with track.scrollBy({left: ±100, behavior: 'smooth'}).

name: add-to-cart-click
delta: Original: POSTs to a private Shopify storefront GraphQL API (blocked by CORS/auth when observed outside the real store context) — not reproducible statically. Clone: pushes {slug, qty, size} into a localStorage cart (window.DoggyCart.add), updates the header cart badge count, and briefly shows "Added!" text on the button.

name: back-to-all-products-hover
trigger: hover "Back To All Products" outline button
delta: Confirmed via source.css: .border-palette-primary + hover:bg-palette-light -- background fills with light violet (#DDD6FE) on hover, border/text stay violet-800. Reproduced as .btn-outline:hover { background: rgb(var(--color-primary-light)); }
